name: BeautifulSoup Scraper
description: Fast HTML crawler for static or lightly dynamic websites using requests + BeautifulSoup. Starting from a root URL, discovers pages via sitemap.xml and internal links (BFS) and returns structured page content. Use this when the site is mostly server-rendered, for quick deep analysis, sitemap-style discovery, or as a complementary view alongside agent-browser / scrape-playwright in comprehensive audits.

maxDepth.description: Maximum link depth from seed URL (optional)

maxPages.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl (optional)
